solo_hijos_directos_rol: Only direct children of the role can be removed from this screen.
solo_hijos_directos_familia: Only direct children of the selected family can be removed.
confirmar_eliminar_rol: Do you want to delete the selected role?
confirmar_eliminar_familia: Do you want to delete the selected family?
ayuda_roles: A role can have direct permissions and families. It cannot contain other roles. The tree shows all effective permissions expanded.
ayuda_familias: A familie can have permissions and subfamilies. The screen prevents cycles and duplicate permissions across the entire branch.
confirmar_eliminacion: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
operacion_fallida: The operation could not be completed.
exc_usr_duplicado: A user with ID '{0}' already exists.
exc_usr_estado_invalido: Cannot execute '{2}' on user '{0}': current state is '{1}'.
exc_contrasenia_invalida: The current password entered for user '{0}' is incorrect.
val_usuario_nulo: The user object cannot be null.
val_contrasenias_iguales: The new password must be different from the current one.
modo_anadir_detalle: Fill in ID, Last name, First name, Email and Role. The system generates the Username and an initial password. Press Apply to create.
modo_modificar_detalle: Only Email and Role can be modified.
modo_actdesact_detalle: You will toggle the Active/Inactive status of the selected user. Press Apply to confirm.
modo_desbloquear_detalle: Select a locked user in the grid and press Apply to unlock.
no_admin_crear: You need administrator permissions to create users.
no_admin_actdesact: You need administrator permissions to enable or disable users.
no_admin_desbloquear: You need administrator permissions to unlock users.
sin_permiso_crear: You don't have permission to create users.
sin_permiso_modificar:
You don't have permission to modify other users.
You can only edit your own email.
sin_permiso_actdesact: You don't have permission to enable or disable users.
sin_permiso_desbloquear: You don't have permission to unlock users.
seleccionar_usuario: Select a user from the grid.
no_permisos_modificar:
You don't have permission to modify other users.
You can only edit your own email.
usuario_no_bloqueado: The selected user is not locked.
no_desactivar_mismo: You cannot deactivate your own account.
error_cargar_usuarios: Could not load the user list.
login_cambiar_pass_requerido: For security, you must change your password before continuing.
login_pass_obligatoria: You must change your password to access the system.
login_pass_actualizada: Your password has been updated. Please sign in again with your new password.
usuario_bloqueado_contacte: The account is locked. Please contact an administrator.
usuario_inactivo_contacte: The account is inactive. Please contact an administrator.
error_conexion_tarde: Connection error. Please try again later.
cambiar_pass_obligatorio_msg: For security, you must change your password before continuing.
completar_tres_campos: Please fill in all three fields.
pass_no_coincide: The new password and confirmation do not match.
pass_actualizada_obligatorio:
Password updated successfully.
You can now sign in.
pass_actualizada_voluntario:
Password updated successfully.
Please sign in again.
fecha_inicial_mayor: The start date cannot be after the end date.
confirmar_cerrar_sesion: Are you sure you want to sign out?
confirmar_relogin: Do you want to sign out?
sesion_activa_bloqueo: There is already an active session on this system. A new one cannot start until the current session is closed.
exc_sesion_activa: Login rejected: there is already an active session for the user with ID '{0}'. Close that session before starting a new one.
rol_modificado_relogin: Your role was modified. For security, you need to sign in again so your permissions are refreshed.
idioma_cambiado_sesion: Language changed. It will be saved when you sign out.
familia_sin_hijos: A family must have at least one permission or subfamily before saving.
rol_sin_hijos: A role must have at least one permission or family before saving.
val_rol_descripcion_duplicada: A role with the description '{0}' already exists.
val_familia_descripcion_duplicada: A group with the description '{0}' already exists.
ayuda_patentes: A permission is the atomic right of the system. Its Id must match a value of the PatenteEnum06AV enum.
confirmar_eliminar_patente: Do you want to delete the selected permission?
val_patente_descripcion_duplicada: A permission with the description '{0}' already exists.
val_patente_id_duplicado: A permission with the Id '{0}' already exists.
